title: handoff.json
description: Per-item, append-only structured cross-phase channel (plan-draft3 §File Contract, D13). The canonical contract surface between phases — each entry carries a prose note plus structured metadata. User-injected context from the dashboard lands here as entries.user_injected_context (D43). The harness writes entries; agents read. Item ID matches whatever the stage's items_id expression extracts (Issue 2).

item_id.description: Item identifier as extracted by the stage's items_id expression. No pattern enforced by the harness (Issue 2).

review_entries.description: Separate buffer for review-phase entries. Allowed but not required — some templates write review findings here instead of into entries[].

parent_session_id.description: Session chain link for -c continuation (plan-draft3 §Protocol: token usage).

note.description: One-paragraph narrative: what was built, what tests cover it, what is deferred. Written by the agent; replaces progress.md.

intended_files.description: Files the implementer intended to modify. Used by reviewers to detect incidental churn.

deferred_criteria.description: Acceptance criteria the implementer consciously deferred with a reason.

reviewer_notes_seen.description: Reviewer note identifiers the implementer has explicitly read (seeded from prior review rounds).

user_injected_context.description: Set by the dashboard when the user injects context for the next session of this feature (D43). Consumed on the next session start.

failure_summary.description: Written by the harness when escalating to retry_mode=fresh_with_failure_summary (plan-draft3 §Retry).

harness_injected.description: True for entries written by the harness (e.g. post-command failures injected via injectHookFailure). Agents should not set this.

command.description: Name of the failed pre/post command when harness_injected is true.

exit_code.description: Exit code of the failed command (null for timeout / spawn failure).

verdict.description: Written by review-phase agent entries. Mirrors the top-level verdict in review-verdict.json.

blocking_issues.description: Written by review entries and harness-injected hook-failure entries. Each string is one blocking issue with AC/RC reference.

non_blocking.description: Written by review entries: minor observations that do not block the feature from completing.

queued_by.description: Always the single local user (plan-draft3 D57); present for audit only.
